properties.displayName: GENMINMDATP EX-AV-028-T1204.002 Varias máquinas infectadas con el mismo usuario
properties.description: Se detectan varias alertas con el mismo usuario. Configurado para MDATP.
properties.query:
//Excluir alerta en watchlist
let watchlist_EX_AV_028_T1204_Alert = (_GetWatchlist('watchlist_EX_AV_028_T1204.002_Alert') 
    | project SearchKey);
SecurityAlert
| where ProviderName == 'MDATP'
| where Status == 'New'
| where AlertName !in (watchlist_EX_AV_028_T1204_Alert)
| mv-expand todynamic(Entities)
| extend Entitiesparser = parse_json(Entities)
| extend Account = iff(Entitiesparser.Type == "account", Entitiesparser.Name, "")
| where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
| where isnotempty(Account)
| summarize by tostring(CompromisedEntity), Account
| summarize count(), make_set(CompromisedEntity) by Account
| where count_ >= 4
| join kind=inner (SecurityAlert
	| where ProviderName == 'MDATP'
	| where Status == 'New'
	| mv-expand todynamic(Entities)
	| extend Entitiesparser = parse_json(Entities)
	| extend Account = iff(Entitiesparser.Type == "account", Entitiesparser.Name, "")
	| where isnotempty(CompromisedEntity)
	| where isnotempty(Account)
	| extend Account = tostring(Account))
	on Account
| project-away count_, set_CompromisedEntity
//| lookup kind=leftouter _GetWatchlist('watchlist_Device_Asset_Inventory') on $left.CompromisedEntity == $right.Host
| project TimeGenerated, ActorUsername = Account, EventType = DisplayName, ThreatName = AlertName, ThreatRef = AlertType, DvcHostname = CompromisedEntity, EventMessage = Description, EventVendor = VendorName, EventProduct = ProviderName, EventReportUrl = AlertLink, EventOriginalUid = VendorOriginalId, ConfidenceScore, IsIncident, EventStartTime = StartTime, EventEndTime = EndTime, Entities, DvcAction = Status, Tactics, Techniques, SubTechniques, ExtendedProperties
